HGSS.193.0000:
First, we will hold your Pokémon in
exchange for you renting our Pokémon.\f
May I suggest choosing Pokémon after
appropriate deliberation?\f
HGSS.193.0003:
Well done!
Your party Pokémon will be healed now.
HGSS.193.0004:
Next up, battle no. [0135,0000,0000]!
Are you ready?
HGSS.193.0005:
Would you like to trade Pokémon before
your battle?
HGSS.193.0006:
Would you like to save the last battle
as your Battle Video?
HGSS.193.0007:
[0103,0000,0000]’s battle has been saved
as a Battle Video.\f
HGSS.193.0008:
There was an error.
The Battle Video couldn’t be saved.\f
HGSS.193.0009:
Delete your existing Battle Video and
save the last battle?
HGSS.193.0010:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
HGSS.193.0011:
Would you like to save and take a break
from playing?
HGSS.193.0012:
Would you like to retire from this
Battle Factory challenge?
HGSS.193.0016:
You have cleared your seventh Battle
Factory match! Congratulations!\f
In recognition of your deep knowledge
in matters pertaining to Pokémon,\r
we present you with BP!\f
HGSS.193.0018:
Let’s trade back your Pokémon that
we’ve been holding for the rentals.\f
HGSS.193.0019:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.

HGSS.193.0035:
Congratulations to you, Trainer!\f
In recognition of your outstanding
winning streak, our Frontier Brain is\r
demanding a match with you.\f
So, your next match is against the
Factory Head with no right of refusal!\f
Are you prepared?\f
HGSS.193.0036:
Thorton: Bzweeeeep!\f
Sorry, don’t mind me.\f
What I’m using is an invention of mine.
It’s my data-interpreting machine.\f
It’s telling me what you’ve rented
for this match.\f
I see! You’ve rented [0100,0000,0000],
[0100,0001,0000], and [0100,0002,0000].\f
I have to say, that’s a good setup.
Like, say, [0133,0003,0000] percent?\r
Oh, don’t let that number concern you!\f
All righty, let’s get going!\f
HGSS.193.0037:
Thorton: Bzweeeeep!\f
Let’s see what I can see about you
through my data-interpreting machine.\f
So, what have you rented for this
match...?\f
I see! You’ve rented [0100,0000,0000],
[0100,0001,0000], and [0100,0002,0000].\f
I have to admit, that’s a good setup.\f
It’s a combination of friendship with
cooperation all around.\f
I’d say it’s like [0133,0003,0000] percent?\r
Oh, don’t let that number concern you!\f
All righty, let’s get going!
No losing for me this time!\f
HGSS.193.0038:
Thorton: Hmm...
I got handed the loss here.\f
It’s not making me happy at all, losing.
Even though I’m not happy, I did glean\r
some useful data, I suppose.\f
That makes me glad I battled you.\f
So, did you get to like those Pokémon
you rented?\f
As the Factory Head, it would sure make
me happy if you did.\f
Next time, come back with different
rental Pokémon.\f
HGSS.193.0039:
Thorton: Hmm...
I got handed another loss.\f
It’s not making me happy at all, this.
In fact, I’m stewing here.\f
I thought I learned a lot about
Pokémon since I lost to you.\f
But that’s all right.
Some things you learn from winning.\r
But some things you learn by losing.\f
I hope you’ll keep renting our Pokémon
and give me a chance to redeem myself!\f
